mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT a.prog_cd , CASE WHEN b.prog_nm IS NOT NULL THEN b.prog_nm ELSE a.prog_nm END AS prog_nm , SUBSTRING(a.prog_no::varchar, 1, LENGTH(a.prog_no) - 2) AS up_prog_no , a.prog_no , #{progLvl} - 3 AS prog_lvl , a.prog_url , a.prog_url_args FROM fscps.cm_program_m a LEFT OUTER JOIN fscps.cm_program_language_m b ON a.prog_cd = b.prog_cd AND b.lang_cl = 'ko' WHERE a.use_yn = 'Y' AND a.menu_yn = 'Y' AND a.system_cl = 'FSBO' AND a.prog_lvl = #{progLvl}::int ORDER BY a.prog_no ) tb WHERE 1 = 1
AND tb.up_prog_no = #{upProgNo}

SELECT a.prog_url AS url , '1' AS search_yn , '1' AS new_yn , '1' AS delete_yn , '1' AS save_yn , '1' AS print_yn , '1' AS btn1_yn , '1' AS btn2_yn , '1' AS btn3_yn , '1' AS btn4_yn , '1' AS btn5_yn , '1' AS btn6_yn , '1' AS btn7_yn , '1' AS btn8_yn , '1' AS btn9_yn , '1' AS btn10_yn , 'Y' AS use_yn FROM fscps.cm_program_m a WHERE a.use_yn = 'Y' AND a.system_cl = 'FSBO' AND a.prog_url IS NOT NULL AND a.prog_url != '' ORDER BY a.prog_no
